_fixture_meta.describes: A manifest auth.schemes array correctly ordered by server preference (most-preferred first, PRD-109-R6). OAuth 2.0 entry declares the required authorization_endpoint, token_endpoint, and a non-empty scopes_supported including 'act.read' (PRD-109-R7). The api_key entry uses the recommended Authorization: Bearer pattern (default header_name) per PRD-109-R8.
